things.name: The Pitons (UNESCO World Heritage)
things.description: Two dramatic volcanic spires rising from the sea - the most iconic image in the Caribbean

things.name: Diamond Falls & Botanical Gardens
things.description: Mineral waterfall tinted with dissolved sulphur and iron - spectrum of colours

things.name: Sulphur Springs Drive-In Volcano
things.description: The world's only drive-in volcano - boiling mud pools and sulphur fumaroles

things.name: Marigot Bay
things.description: One of the most beautiful bays in the Caribbean - the hiding place of the British fleet

things.name: Rodney Bay & Reduit Beach
things.description: Saint Lucia's best beach with a world-class marina

things.name: Castries Market
things.description: Vibrant market with local crafts, spices and tropical produce

things.name: Rainforest Tram at Castries
things.description: Aerial tram through the rainforest canopy

things.name: Nobel Laureate Trail
things.description: Saint Lucia has produced two Nobel Prize winners per capita - the most of any country

things.name: Anse Chastanet Reef Snorkelling
things.description: Caribbean's best snorkelling reef directly below the Pitons

things.name: Green Fig & Salt Fish
things.description: Saint Lucia's national dish - boiled green bananas with salt cod sauteed in onions and peppers
